changeSet.author: alona
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.[user] (username, email, password_hash, phone, first_name, last_name, is_active) VALUES ('admin', 'admin@scooterental.ua', '$2a$12$K8Y3rQw0ZNAhXvLpN2mFzO1kRtJuMsPdHgCyWqIxAoBlE5nVjT7mu', '+380501234567', 'Admin', 'System', 1), ('john_doe', 'john.doe@example.com', '$2a$12$K8Y3rQw0ZNAhXvLpN2mFzO1kRtJuMsPdHgCyWqIxAoBlE5nVjT7mu', '+380507654321', 'John', 'Doe', 1), ('jane_smith', 'jane.smith@example.com', '$2a$12$K8Y3rQw0ZNAhXvLpN2mFzO1kRtJuMsPdHgCyWqIxAoBlE5nVjT7mu', '+380503456789', 'Jane', 'Smith', 1);
